steps.instruction: The HDR donor vectors used to revert GBA1 N370S to WT were built using pDONOR-tagBFP-PSM-EGFP (Addgene, 100603) and pDONOR-tagBFP-PSM-dTOMATO (Addgene, 100604) as backbones. Both vectors were digested with HpaI - 500 units New England Biolabs Catalog #R0105S at 37 °C for 04:00:00 to generate two fragments of the vectors.

Two custom gene blocks corresponding to the left 1-kb HDR arm and the right1-kb HDR arm of GBA1 were assembled with the two fragments from pDONOR-tagBFP-PSM-EGFP, and with the two from pDONOR-tagBFP-PSM-dTOMATO using NEBuilder‱ HiFi DNA Assembly (NewEngland Biolabs, E5520), generating the GBA1- WT-pDONOR-tagBFP-PSM-EGFPand GBA1- WT-pDONOR-tagBFP-PSM-dTOMATO, respectively. Excision-only PiggyBac Transposase expression vector (PB220PA-1) was purchased from SystemBiosciences.
PCR purification of the two fragments of both vectors.
